candidates.prompt:
{
  "IMPORTANT_STRICT_RULE": "ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT. NO LETTERS. NO SLOGANS. NO LOGOS. NO BUTTONS. NO UI ELEMENTS.",
  "asset_type": "high-end symbolic industrial photography",
  "business_context": "Rally Technology, industrial automation. Delivery process step: Scope Confirmation.",
  "goal": "A symbolic, high-impact close-up image representing 'Scope and Requirements'.",
  "visual_subject": "A high-end metallic magnifying glass resting on top of detailed technical blueprints or a precise measuring instrument (like a digital caliper).",
  "technical_signals": {
    "lens": "Macro photography for extreme detail and shallow depth of field",
    "aperture": "f/2.8 for cinematic background blur",
    "light_source": "Sharp edge-lighting. Technical teal glows reflecting on dark graphite metal.",
    "color_palette": "Rally Teal and Graphite. Neutral professional whites."
  },
  "material_notes": [
    "Matte graphite steel",
    "Detailed technical drawings with fine lines",
    "Brushed aluminum textures"
  ],
  "avoid": [
    "TEXT",
    "LETTERS",
    "HUMAN FACES",
    "CARTOONISH ICONS",
    "FLAT GRAPHICS"
  ],
  "FINAL_REMINDER": "GENERATE A REAL PHOTOGRAPHIC MACRO SHOT. NO TEXT."
}
